(Translated by Google)
Very nice YPF to rest a while and continue, on my two visits the bathrooms were clean

reviews.comment:
No hay opciones alimentarias para personas que respetamos a la Madretierra...ningún menú apto vegan. Alta discriminación, deberían hacer ensaladas con quinua, lentejas, cualquier legumbre más sano para un@, para el planeta y el bolsillo! Despierte gente del lugar!! Respetemos la vida...NO SOMOS LOS UNIVOS SERES QUE MERECEMOS VIVIR! TOD🐷S SOMOS ANIMALES

(Translated by Google)
There are no food options for people who respect Mother Earth...no vegan-friendly menu. This is blatant discrimination. They should make salads with quinoa, lentils, any legume that's healthier for us, the planet, and our wallets! Wake up, people! Let's respect life...WE ARE NOT THE ONLY BEINGS WHO DESERVE TO LIVE! WE ARE ALL ANIMALS!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdXFhQXZBRRAB

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest after your trip. Good beds and the service from Ana Luz. Incredible.

reviews.comment:
Habitación cómoda, con frigobar. Como el agua de red no es potable, te dejan unas botellitas frías.
Las camas son king y muuuuy cómodas. Todo muy limpio.
El desayuno (completo) es en el Full, a partir de las 7.15 hs. La buena atención en playa y Full es para destacar.
Lo recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable room with a mini-fridge. Since the tap water isn't drinkable, they provide some chilled bottled water.
The beds are king-size and very comfortable. Everything is very clean.
Breakfast (full) is served at the Full Restaurant starting at 7:15 am. The excellent service at the beach and the Full Restaurant is noteworthy.
I highly recommend it!

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias 😊 Rodrigo por tu comentario. Nos alegra mucho que hayas disfrutado tu estadía

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURENzk2RzBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Habitaciones impecables y cómodas y atención execelente de Tisiana y Sabrina. Recomiendo para descansar bien durante un viaje el desayuno muy completo, incluye un yogurt a elección, un jugo en cajita o agua y cereales, más allá del café y medialunas. Conforme

(Translated by Google)
The rooms were spotless and comfortable, and Tisiana and Sabrina provided excellent service. I highly recommend the very complete breakfast for a good night's sleep during your trip; it includes a choice of yogurt, a boxed juice or water, and cereal, in addition to coffee and croissants. Satisfied.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaF9ldUR3EAE
